allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const h=fs.readFileSync\('C:/Users/59893/Documents/Claude/Projects/Juanmo Times/index.html','utf8'\);const m=h.match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/\);if\(!m\){console.log\('no script tag found'\);process.exit\(1\);}try{new Function\(m[1]\);console.log\('index.html JS: OK \(parsed successfully\)'\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('JS parse error:',e.message\);process.exit\(1\);}")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const h=fs.readFileSync\('C:/Users/59893/Documents/Claude/Projects/Juanmo Times/index.html','utf8'\);const m=h.match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/\);try{new Function\(m[1]\);console.log\('JS parse: OK'\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('JS parse FAIL:',e.message\);process.exit\(1\);}const openTags=\(h.match\(/<\(\\w+\)/g\)||[]\).length;const closeTags=\(h.match\(/<\\/\\w+/g\)||[]\).length;const selfClose=\(h.match\(/\\/>/g\)||[]\).length;console.log\('Tags open:',openTags,'close:',closeTags,'self-close:',selfClose\);console.log\('Balance:',openTags-selfClose,'vs close:',closeTags\);")
